meaning: adj.无特权的,享受不到特权的,<美>贫穷的,社会最底层
examples: Do charity not because we are strong and rich, but because of the fragility of life for the unprivileged.
Agriculture is a weak industry, villages are disadvantaged areas, and farm - ers are unprivileged groups.
But such preferential treatments are primarily accorded to members of the unprivileged classes to promote social equality.
